title: Adopting a Protocol 🤝
description: Sign the contract and agree to the rules.

slides.title: Signing the Contract 🤝
Fulfilling the Rules ✅

quizData.question: If a Protocol demands three methods, how many methods MUST the adopting Struct provide?
quizData.explanation: To successfully conform to a Protocol, the adopting Type must fulfill 100% of the mandatory requirements. Partial credit is not accepted!

slides.title: See It in Action
slides.content: Notice how the `Identifiable` protocol simply ensures that *any* Type that adopts it contains an `id` property!
